2603.26164.title: DataFlex: A Unified Framework for Data-Centric Dynamic Training of Large Language Models
2603.26164.paper_summary: Data-centric training has emerged as a promising direction for improving large language models (LLMs) by optimizing not only model parameters but also the selection, composition, and weighting of training data during optimization. However, existing approaches to data selection, data mixture optimization, and data reweighting are often developed in isolated codebases with inconsistent interfaces, hindering reproducibility, fair comparison, and practical integration. In this paper, we present DataFlex, a unified data-centric dynamic training framework built upon LLaMA-Factory. DataFlex supports three major paradigms of dynamic data optimization: sample selection, domain mixture adjustment, and sample reweighting, while remaining fully compatible with the original training workflow. It provides extensible trainer abstractions and modular components, enabling a drop-in replacement for standard LLM training, and unifies key model-dependent operations such as embedding extraction, inference, and gradient computation, with support for large-scale settings including DeepSpeed ZeRO-3. We conduct comprehensive experiments across multiple data-centric methods. Dynamic data selection consistently outperforms static full-data training on MMLU across both Mistral-7B and Llama-3.2-3B. For data mixture, DoReMi and ODM improve both MMLU accuracy and corpus-level perplexity over default proportions when pretraining Qwen2.5-1.5B on SlimPajama at 6B and 30B token scales. DataFlex also achieves consistent runtime improvements over original implementations. These results demonstrate that DataFlex provides an effective, efficient, and reproducible infrastructure for data-centric dynamic training of LLMs.
2603.26164.paper_summary_zh: 資料中心的訓練已成為改善大型語言模型（LLMs）的有前景方向，不僅優化模型參數，還優化訓練數據的選擇、組合和加權。然而，現有的數據選擇、數據混合優化和數據重加權方法通常在孤立的代碼庫中開發，接口不一致，妨礙了可重複性、公平比較和實際整合。在本文中，我們提出了DataFlex，一個基於LLaMA-Factory的統一數據中心動態訓練框架。DataFlex支持三個主要的動態數據優化範式：樣本選擇、領域混合調整和樣本重加權，同時與原始訓練工作流程完全兼容。它提供可擴展的訓練器抽象和模塊化組件，使其能夠作為標準LLM訓練的即插即用替代方案，並統一關鍵的模型依賴操作，如嵌入提取、推理和梯度計算，支持包括DeepSpeed ZeRO-3在內的大規模設置。我們在多個數據中心方法上進行了全面實驗。動態數據選擇在MMLU上始終優於靜態全數據訓練，無論是在Mistral-7B還是Llama-3.2-3B上。對於數據混合，DoReMi和ODM在預訓練Qwen2.5-1.5B於SlimPajama的6B和30B標記規模時，改善了MMLU準確性和語料庫級別的困惑度。DataFlex還在運行時間上相對於原始實現實現了一致的改進。這些結果表明，DataFlex為LLMs的數據中心動態訓練提供了一個有效、高效且可重複的基礎架構。
2603.26164.author: Hao Liang et.al.
2603.26164.authors: Hao Liang, Zhengyang Zhao, Meiyi Qiang, Mingrui Chen, Lu Ma, Rongyi Yu, Hengyi Feng, Shixuan Sun, Zimo Meng, Xiaochen Ma, Xuanlin Yang, Qifeng Cai, Ruichuan An, Bohan Zeng, Zhen Hao Wong, Chengyu Shen, Runming He, Zhaoyang Han, Yaowei Zheng, Fangcheng Fu, Conghui He, Bin Cui, Zhiyu Li, Weinan E, Wentao Zhang
